changes.description: Rewrote SKILL.md with explicit JSON schemas, Python script examples, and step-by-step procedures for all 3 tasks. Added date conversion rules and key number extraction guidance.
Added CRITICAL instruction to always write Python scripts instead of JSON directly, to avoid truncation. Provided full Python scripts in SKILL.md for all 3 tasks.

Bundled pre-built Python scripts in scripts/ directory (parse_rss.py, make_digest.py, make_briefing.py). Simplified SKILL.md to just reference bundled scripts with one-line commands. This eliminated all SLM code generation issues: truncated JSON, malformed f-strings, empty tool calls.
Confirmation run — verified 100/100 scores are stable across runs.

key_insight: qwen3-30b cannot reliably write large JSON files (truncates closing braces) or copy Python scripts from skill instructions (garbles f-strings, fails tool calls). Bundling ready-to-run scripts eliminates these failure modes entirely — the model just needs to run a single bash command.
